assertions.description: The design_observations entry for U1 (LM386) lists rails_without_caps=['+9V'] and rails_with_caps=[]. However, the schematic nets clearly show C3 (0.1µF disc cap) and C4 (100µF electrolytic) both connected to the +9V rail along with U1 pin 6 (V+). The decoupling_analysis list is also empty. The analyzer is failing to associate C3 and C4 with the +9V power rail when evaluating the LM386 decoupling coverage.

The LM386 is from the Amplifier_Audio KiCad library and is wired as a classic audio power amplifier: input at pin 3 (+), gain-setting cap C1 (10µF) across pins 1-8, bypass cap C2 on pin 7, Zobel network (R1+C5), output coupling cap C7 (470µF) to speaker connector J3. Despite the subcircuit being identified around U1, neither opamp_circuits nor buzzer_speaker_circuits contain any entries. The audio amplifier topology is a missed detection.
